workflow_runs.title: Implement issue 9 skills-first slash workflow surface
workflow_runs.next_action: Ask what the router should do after loaded identification finds a likely existing workflow but not enough certainty.
workflow_runs.decision: On vague workflow/problem messages, immediately track the run, then load project tracker, workflow registry, current projects, previous handoffs, existing workflow surfaces, and relevant prior artifacts before deciding existing workflow vs continuation vs new workflow creation.
